response.overview: Radala Piliruwa is a 1954 Sri Lankan film directed by T. R. Sundaram. The film stars Laddie Ranasinghe, Rita Ratnayake, Dommie Jayawardena, Herbie Seneviratne,  Millie Kahandawela, Shanthi Lekha, Udula Dabare. Released on 24 December. Based onW. A. Silva's novel with same name. The film was produced in Sri Lanka.
response.title: Radala Piliruwa
